questions.question: What is the main advantage of using the chalk and talk method for teaching?
questions.explanation: The chalk and talk method allows for interactive discussion and promotes student participation, making it an effective way to teach and learn.

questions.question: Which of the following is NOT a characteristic of a PowerPoint presentation?
options: It is a self-paced learning tool
It is a text-based learning material
questions.explanation: A PowerPoint presentation is typically a self-paced learning tool, whereas a live lecture involves a teacher delivering content in real-time.

questions.question: What is the primary purpose of using PowerPoint presentations in the teaching-learning process?
options: To provide a visual aid for learning
questions.explanation: PowerPoint presentations can be used to provide a visual aid for learning, making complex concepts more accessible and easier to understand.

questions.question: Which of the following is a disadvantage of using the chalk and talk method?
questions.explanation: One disadvantage of the chalk and talk method is that it can be time-consuming, as the teacher must write notes by hand and deliver content at a slower pace.

questions.question: What is a key benefit of using PowerPoint presentations in the teaching-learning process?
options: It provides a visual aid for learning
questions.explanation: One key benefit of using PowerPoint presentations is that they provide a visual aid for learning, making complex concepts more accessible and easier to understand.
